TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_psaniq(з¶БењМ), title = psaniq(з¶БењМ), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/psaniq(з¶БењМ)} }

S.FORM: zyuwaw na psaniq hya ga, yaqu iyat qqyaqih na gaga tayal, kya qu hmiriq sa gaga Tayal lga, yasa qu mutuw phawgun na Utux la.
zyuwaw na psaniq hya ga, yaqu iyat qqyaqih na gaga tayal, kya qu hmiriq sa gaga Tayal lga, yasa qu mutuw phawgun na Utux la.
S.PHON: zjuwaw na ps~…Хaniq ƒІja …£a, jaqu ijat qqjaqiƒІ na …£a…£a tajal, kja qu ƒІmiriq s~…Хa …£a…£a tajal l…£a, jas~…Хa qu mutuw pƒІaw…£un na utux la.
